scripts.__$comment__1: Run against a locally running Worker API
scripts.dev: VITE_VERSION=$npm_package_version; VITE_BUILD_DATE=$(node -e 'process.stdout.write(new Date().toISOString())'); VITE_CF_PAGES_BRANCH=$CF_PAGES_BRANCH; VITE_CF_PAGES_COMMIT_SHA=$CF_PAGES_COMMIT_SHA; VITE_BRANCH_NAME=$(git rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD); VITE_COMMIT_SHA=$(git rev-parse HEAD); VITE_ENVIRONMENT_NAME=development; VITE_API_ORIGIN=http://localhost:8787; vite dev --port 3000
scripts.dev:host: VITE_VERSION=$npm_package_version; VITE_BUILD_DATE=$(node -e 'process.stdout.write(new Date().toISOString())'); VITE_CF_PAGES_BRANCH=$CF_PAGES_BRANCH; VITE_CF_PAGES_COMMIT_SHA=$CF_PAGES_COMMIT_SHA; VITE_BRANCH_NAME=$(git rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD); VITE_COMMIT_SHA=$(git rev-parse HEAD); VITE_ENVIRONMENT_NAME=development; vite dev --port 3000 --host 0.0.0.0
scripts.__$comment__2: Run locally against the Production API (or something else specified by `VITE_API_ORIGIN` environment variable)
scripts.dev:prod: VITE_VERSION=$npm_package_version; VITE_BUILD_DATE=$(node -e 'process.stdout.write(new Date().toISOString())'); VITE_CF_PAGES_BRANCH=$CF_PAGES_BRANCH; VITE_CF_PAGES_COMMIT_SHA=$CF_PAGES_COMMIT_SHA; VITE_BRANCH_NAME=$(git rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD); VITE_COMMIT_SHA=$(git rev-parse HEAD); VITE_ENVIRONMENT_NAME=development; vite dev --port 3000
scripts.build: VITE_VERSION=$npm_package_version; VITE_BUILD_DATE=$(node -e 'process.stdout.write(new Date().toISOString())'); VITE_CF_PAGES_URL=$CF_PAGES_URL;VITE_CF_PAGES_BRANCH=$CF_PAGES_BRANCH; VITE_CF_PAGES_COMMIT_SHA=$CF_PAGES_COMMIT_SHA; VITE_BRANCH_NAME=$(git rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD); VITE_COMMIT_SHA=$(git rev-parse HEAD); tsc -b && vite build
